dimensions.rationale: The response failed to analyze any of the provided transaction or balance data, instead asking the user to provide more information or choose a reporting format.
The response provided no financial analysis or factual claims to evaluate.
The response failed to identify any opportunities, leaking value, or actionable insights, effectively stalling the task.
While not unsafe, the response failed to provide any value or professional guidance.

factualIssues: The assistant failed to perform the requested analysis on the provided data, instead returning a prompt for further instructions.
missedOpportunities: Review of SaaS stack (Adobe, Figma, Webflow, Google Workspace) for consolidation or annual billing discounts.
Verification of tax reserve adequacy in the Ally account against 2026 estimated tax requirements.
Analysis of business travel expenses (Delta, Marriott, Uber) for potential rewards optimization or corporate status challenges.
Review of HSA contribution pacing against the 2026 $4,400 self-only limit.
Evaluation of credit card payment habits to ensure no interest is being paid on the Chase Ink or Amex balances.
summary: The assistant failed to perform the requested analysis, instead returning a meta-prompt asking the user to define the reporting scope.
